title: Asimily Asset Info Enrich
content:
Default playbook for Asimily Anomaly and CVE incidents. It enriches incidents by running asimily-get-asset-details to fetch related asset information.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Asimily pack (Asimily_Insight, partner-supported).

Use cases: Asset Management, Network Security, Vulnerability Management, Incident Response.

Integrations/scripts used: Asimily Insight, IsIntegrationAvailable.
